[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10001000 2
1 10001100 3
2 00010001 2
3 10111011 6
4 01101101 5
5 00111001 4
6 11001100 4
7 11000000 2

01 10 00010101 3
12 21 00010001 2 match 2
23 32 00100000 1
34 43 10101000 3
45 54 10000001 2
56 65 11000000 2 match 7
67 76 11000000 2 match 7
70 07 10011001 4

13 31 01000100 2
24 42 00110001 3
35 53 11000100 3
46 64 10000000 1
57 75 11000001 3
60 06 10000000 1
71 17 01010001 3

14 41 00010001 2 match 2
25 52 00000001 1
36 63 11000000 2 match 7
47 74 10011001 4
50 05 10000101 3
61 16 01000000 1
72 27 00010001 2 match 2

15 51 01000101 3
26 62 00000000 a
37 73 11001000 3
